UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the imposing presence of Hades, the transformation he represents, and the fallen crowned king as a symbol of change or loss.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the fear aspect of Hades. Instead, focus on the inevitable nature of his transformation.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Death card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, percussion, mystical, ethereal, major, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the eternal exile, the haggard cursed nomad, and the barren tree symbolizing a sense of desolation and longing.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the storm or grime as they are more symbolic representations of the character's journey rather than central themes.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Death card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, soft, introspective, mystical, ambient, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Death card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the cyclical nature of Persephone's journey between the underworld and spring, emphasizing the bittersweet yet hopeful transition from endings to beginnings.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing fear or dread associated with death, instead focus on the renewal and transformation it symbolizes.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Death card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, minor, contemplative, instrumental
